key_registry.lookup: Resolve by account_id and key_id at operator_approval.signed_at. A key is valid only when valid_from <= signed_at and valid_until, revoked_at, and compromised_at are absent or strictly after signed_at.
key_registry.key_id: lowercase SHA-256 hex digest of canonical raw Ed25519 public key bytes

envelope.timestamp_rule: signed_at is a UTC ISO 8601 timestamp with microsecond precision and a Z suffix.
envelope.payload_type_rule: payload_type MUST equal permit.operator_approval.v1. No other permit v2 signature slot may satisfy this claim.

canonical_payload.hash_rule: signed_payload_hash is the lowercase SHA-256 hex digest of the canonical signed payload bytes.

temporal_rules.permit_window: operator_approval.signed_at MUST be inside the permit valid_from..valid_until window.

verdicts.supported: envelope shape, payload type, payload hash, signer binding, signing-time key resolution, permit window, and signature verification are supported.
verdicts.disproved: payload type, payload hash, signer binding, permit window, or signature verification fails.
verdicts.insufficient_evidence: slot evidence, permit canonical inputs, account key registry evidence, signer identity, key id, signing timestamp, or signature material is missing.
verdicts.unverifiable_scope: permit format version, canonicalization profile, key-registry profile, or timestamp profile is unsupported.
